description: A choose action whose default branch contains an app-coupled notify action is app-class as a whole, which in turn forces the entire containing rule app-class even though its trigger and every other action would otherwise be edge-eligible. The classifier's per-member diagnostic (RUL-006) names the nested notify action as the specific disqualifying member.

expected.reason: the default branch's notify action is app-class unconditionally
expected.reason_rule: RUL-002: a rule is edge-class only if every action is edge-class; the choose action here is not
